heading: Jurisdiction of Department of Energy and Environmental Protection Agency
label: 8838 Jurisdiction of Department of Energy and Environmental Protection Agency
text: The provisions of section 5920(c) of this title, relating to the responsibilities of the Environmental Protection Agency and the Department of Energy, shall apply with respect to actions under this subchapter to the same extent and in the same manner as such provisions apply to actions under section 5920 of this title.11See References in Text note below.1
